debug_info.goal:
K : Type u_1
L : Type u_2
inst✝³ : Field K
inst✝² : Field L
inst✝¹ : Algebra K L
inst✝ : Finite K
⊢ IsCyclotomicExtension {n | ↑n ≠ 0} K L ↔ IsAlgClosure K L

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ : ∃ x : AlgebraicClosure L,
          Polynomial.eval x (Polynomial.map (algebraMap L (AlgebraicClosure L)) p) = 0 :=
        IsAlgClosed.exists_root _ (by aesop)
      have hx_alg_L : IsAlgebraic L x :=
        ⟨p, by aesop, by simpa [Polynomial.eval_map] using hx⟩
      have hx_alg : IsAlgebraic K x := hx_alg_L.restrictScalars K
      have hx_in_L : x ∈ Set.range (algebraMap L (AlgebraicClosure L)) := by
        rcases element_rou_ac x hx_alg with rfl | ⟨n, hn_pos, hn_ne_zero, hn_root⟩
        · exact ⟨0, map_zero _⟩
        · obtain ⟨ζ, hζ⟩ := h.exists_isPrimitiveRoot
            (show n ∈ {n : ℕ | ¬(n : K) = 0} from by simpa) hn_pos.ne'
          exact rou_in_base n hn_pos.ne' ζ hζ x hn_root
      obtain ⟨y, rfl⟩ := hx_in_L
      exact ⟨y, by simpa [Polynomial.eval_map] using hx⟩
    exact ⟨h_alg_closed, h_alg⟩
  · intro h
    constructor
    · intro n hn hn'
      haveI : NeZero (n : L) := by
        constructor; intro h_eq; apply hn
        rwa [← map_natCast (algebraMap K L), map_eq_zero] at h_eq
      have hcyc := h.isAlgClosed.exists_root (Polynomial.cyclotomic n L)
        (by rw [Polynomial.degree_cyclotomic]
            exact_mod_cast (Nat.totient_pos.mpr (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn')).ne')
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hcyc
      exact ⟨x, Polynomial.isRoot_cyclotomic_iff.mp hx⟩
    · intro x
      have hx_alg : IsAlgebraic K x := h.isAlgebraic.isAlgebraic x
      rcases element_rou x hx_alg with rfl | ⟨n, hn_pos, hn_ne, hxn⟩
      · exact Subalgebra.zero_mem _
      · exact Algebra.subset_adjoin ⟨n, hn_ne, hn_pos.ne', hxn⟩
